ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "energy_policy" TEXT /* Brief description of the country's energy policy */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the energy data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the energy data was recorded */,
  "production" REAL /* Energy production in the country for the given year */,
  "consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption in the country for the given year */,
  "renewable_energy_production" REAL /* Renewable energy production */,
  "non_renewable_energy_production" REAL /* Non-renewable energy production */,
  "energy_imports" REAL /* Energy imports */,
  "energy_exports" REAL /* Energy exports */,
  "energy_efficiency_rating" REAL /* Energy efficiency rating (0-100) */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the energy data (e.g., government, third-party) */,
  "data_reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data (0-100) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the energy data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the economic data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the economic data was recorded */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country for the given year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the given year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the given year */,
  "trade_balance" REAL /* Trade balance (exports - imports) for the given year */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the economic data (e.g., government, third-party) */,
  "data_reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the data (0-100) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the economic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the dataset belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset (e.g., energy, economic) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the dataset was recorded */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the dataset file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset (e.g., v1, v2) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the dataset (0-100) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., environmental, social) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Common source for this data type */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Average quality score for this data type (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  "economic_events" TEXT /* Major economic events for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "file_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the file (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "file_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the file (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "total_countries" INTEGER /* Total number of countries in the continent */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the continent */,
  "total_gdp" REAL /* Total GDP of the continent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the continent data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_continents" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the version (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_version_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "file_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the file (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_version_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id")
)
